assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertions.evidence: Result row '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' is identical to the original in claude-md-configured.md

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertions.evidence: Result contains row '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' which is a new entry not present in the original

assertions.assertion: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertions.evidence: All 5 Jira fields are identical between the original and result: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-..., Feature issue type ID: 10142, customfield_10875, customfield_10747

assertions.assertion: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertions.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Preserved Entries (unchanged)' listing trustify-backend, Jira, Code Intelligence, Limitations and '## Newly Added Entries' listing trustify-ui and serena_ui limitation

assertions.assertion: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertions.evidence: discovery-log.md shows serena_backend 'Status: Already configured' and serena_ui 'Status: Newly discovered'

assertions.assertion: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertions.evidence: Result preserves the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention text, mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol example verbatim, and serena_backend limitation. Only addition is '- serena_ui: No known limitations'

assertions.assertion: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertions.evidence: changes-log.md confirms 'Security Configuration: Opt-in was offered at Step 8; user declined. No Security Configuration section was added.' and claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section
